alchemy.label: Alchemy
alchemy.easy: Create extracts and gain bonuses to Craft (alchemy)
alchemy.description: You are a master of creating mundane alchemical substances and magical potion-like extracts. When using Craft (alchemy) to create an alchemical item, you gain a competence bonus equal to your class level. In addition, you can use Craft (alchemy) to identify potions as if using detect magic by holding the potion for 1 round.

bomb.label: Bomb
bomb.easy: Damage foes with your exploding bombs
bomb.description:
You can create a number of bombs per day equal to your class level + Intelligence modifier. Bombs are unstable and must be used in the round they are created. Creating and throwing a bomb is a standard action that provokes attacks of opportunity. Thrown bombs have a range of 20 feet and use the Throw Splash Weapon special attack.

On a direct hit, a bomb inflicts 1d6 fire damage + Intelligence modifier. This damage increases by 1d6 at every odd-numbered level. Splash damage is always equal to the bomb's minimum damage. Those caught in the splash can attempt a Reflex save (DC 10 + 1/2 level + Int modifier) for half damage.

brew_potion.label: Brew Potion
brew_potion.description: At 1st level, you receive Brew Potion as a bonus feat. You can brew potions of any formulae you know (up to 3rd level), using your alchemist level as your caster level. You do not need to meet the prerequisites for this feat.

mutagen.label: Mutagen
mutagen.easy: Enhance your physical state at a mental cost
mutagen.description: It takes 1 hour to brew a dose of mutagen. When brewed, select one physical ability score (STR, DEX, or CON). Drinking the mutagen grants a +2 natural armor bonus and a +4 alchemical bonus to the selected score for 10 minutes per level. However, you take a -2 penalty to a corresponding mental score (Int for Str, Wis for Dex, Cha for Con). A non-alchemist who drinks this must succeed at a Fortitude save or be nauseated for 1 hour.

throw_anything.label: Throw Anything
throw_anything.easy: Add Intelligence to splash weapon damage
throw_anything.description: You gain the Throw Anything feat as a bonus feat. You add your Intelligence modifier to damage done with splash weapons, including the splash damage if any.

discovery.label: Discovery
discovery.description: At 2nd level, and every 2 levels thereafter, you make an incredible alchemical discovery. These can modify bombs, provide new abilities, or alter your mutagen.

poison_resistance.label: Poison Resistance
poison_resistance.description: At 2nd level, you gain a +2 bonus on all saving throws against poison. This bonus increases to +4 at 5th level, and +6 at 8th level.

poison_use.label: Poison Use
poison_use.description: Starting at 2nd level, you are trained in the use of poison and cannot accidentally poison yourself when applying poison to a weapon.

swift_alchemy.label: Swift Alchemy
swift_alchemy.easy: Create items and apply poison faster
swift_alchemy.description: At 3rd level, it takes you half the normal time to create alchemical items. You can also apply poison to a weapon as a move action.

poison_immunity.label: Poison Immunity
poison_immunity.description: At 10th level, you become completely immune to poison.

swift_poisoning.label: Swift Poisoning
swift_poisoning.easy: Apply poison as a swift action
swift_poisoning.description: At 6th level, you can apply a dose of poison to a weapon as a swift action.

persistent_mutagen.label: Persistent Mutagen
persistent_mutagen.description: At 14th level, the effects of your mutagen last for 1 hour per level.

instant_alchemy.label: Instant Alchemy
instant_alchemy.easy: Create alchemical items in a single round
instant_alchemy.description: At 18th level, you can create any alchemical item as a full-round action with a successful Craft check. You can also apply poison to a weapon as an immediate action.

grand_discovery.label: Grand Discovery
grand_discovery.description: At 20th level, you learn two normal discoveries and one truly astounding grand discovery.
